query:
-- Insert 20 furniture products with complete information

-- Sofa Beds (5 products)
INSERT INTO products (sku, name, nameCn, categoryId, description, descriptionCn, material, dimensions, weight, color, fob1, fob2, fob3, status, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES
('SB-001-GRY', 'Modern Convertible Sofa Bed - Gray', '现代可转换沙发床 - 灰色', 1, 'A modern convertible sofa bed with clean lines, upholstered in light gray fabric, featuring tufted cushions and wooden legs. Perfect for small apartments and guest rooms.', '采用浅灰色面料装饰的现代可转换沙发床，线条简洁，配有簇绒坐垫和木质腿。非常适合小公寓和客房。', 'Fabric, Wood, Metal Frame', '200cm x 90cm x 85cm', 45.5, 'Light Gray', 285.00, 265.00, 245.00, 'active', NOW(), NOW()),
('SB-002-NVY', 'Luxury Velvet Sofa Bed - Navy Blue', '豪华天鹅绒沙发床 - 海军蓝', 1, 'A luxurious velvet sofa bed in deep navy blue color, with gold metal legs and button-tufted backrest. Modern Scandinavian design that adds elegance to any living space.', '深海军蓝色的豪华天鹅绒沙发床，配有金色金属腿和纽扣簇绒靠背。现代斯堪的纳维亚设计为任何生活空间增添优雅气息。', 'Velvet, Metal Frame', '210cm x 95cm x 88cm', 52.0, 'Navy Blue', 425.00, 395.00, 365.00, 'active', NOW(), NOW()),
('SB-003-BGE', 'Minimalist Linen Sofa Bed - Beige', '极简亚麻沙发床 - 米色', 1, 'A minimalist sofa bed with beige linen fabric, low profile design, featuring removable armrests and chrome legs. Contemporary style perfect for modern homes.', '米色亚麻面料的极简沙发床，低调设计，配有可拆卸扶手和镀铬腿。现代风格，非常适合现代家居。', 'Linen, Chrome Steel', '195cm x 88cm x 80cm', 38.5, 'Beige', 315.00, 295.00, 275.00, 'active', NOW(), NOW()),
('SB-004-CHR', 'L-Shaped Sofa Bed with Storage - Charcoal', 'L型储物沙发床 - 炭灰色', 1, 'A contemporary L-shaped sofa bed in charcoal gray fabric with chaise lounge, featuring storage compartment and chrome legs. Modern multifunctional design.', '炭灰色面料的现代L型沙发床，配有贵妃椅、储物隔间和镀铬腿。现代多功能设计。', 'Fabric, Metal Frame, Storage', '280cm x 160cm x 90cm', 68.0, 'Charcoal Gray', 565.00, 525.00, 485.00, 'active', NOW(), NOW()),
('SB-005-TEA', 'Compact Two-Seater Sofa Bed - Teal', '紧凑型双人沙发床 - 青绿色', 1, 'A compact two-seater sofa bed in teal blue fabric with rounded arms and wooden legs. Scandinavian minimalist design, ideal for small spaces.', '青绿色面料的紧凑型双人沙发床，配有圆形扶手和木质腿。斯堪的纳维亚极简设计，非常适合小空间。', 'Fabric, Wood', '155cm x 85cm x 82cm', 32.5, 'Teal Blue', 245.00, 225.00, 205.00, 'active', NOW(), NOW());
